company_name: Mu Sigma Business Solution Pvt. Ltd.
stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (CSE, ECE, EEE, IT, EIE, ETE, Civil, Mechanical, Industrial & System Engineering, Biotechnology, Computer Science and Business Systems, Electronic Communication & Instrumentation Engineering, Aerospace Engineering & Aircraft Engineering)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Compensation over 4 years: 40 Lakhs 6-months’ Probation 5 LPA 1st Year 2nd Year 6.5 LPA 3rd Year 12.5 LPA 4th Year 16 LPA
package_salary.bond: Every joinee will be required to serve a probationary period and sign a 2-year agreement with us. If someone chooses to leave within 24 months after probation, a recovery clause of ₹10 Lakhs will be applicable.
